description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image with three stages: install, build, and deploy. In the install stage add a clean job that runs `npm run clean` and stores the `public` directory as an artifact, and an installDeps job that runs `npm i` and stores the `node_modules` directory as an artifact. In the build stage add a build job that depends on clean and installDeps, runs `ls -ltar` then `npm run build`, and publishes the `public` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on build, runs `ls -ltarR public`, publishes the `public` directory as the pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
